narrative:
Cols 74-E (precinct in Franklin County) has 1,127 registered voters, with 68.3% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 12.9% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 18.8%, a modest Democratic lean of 5.9 percentage points.
